summary: IDDD Bibliographic Inventory is a source packet for this package is the final handoff of a source-grounded field/discipline inventory extracted from the IDDD manuscript (Individual in the Democratic Dialectic, IDDD.docx, SHA-256 b0bd6d3f6db4be8cbc230c9371b08f10b56a1ea1221ad8524802cc73810f77e0, 40,838 paragraphs, 38,345 nonempty blocks, 8 tables, 3,596,306 characters, ~518,804 words).
final_use_case: It preserves the distinctive design logic for IDDD Bibliographic Inventory, so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.

instruments.instrument_name: IDDD Bibliographic Inventory Data Schema And Persistence Plan
instruments.input: entities, records, IDs, tables, JSON structures, indexes, and state transitions
instruments.operation: Political theory, democracy, individuality, and civic formation. Use source library political theory as a central source reservoir for the Book Trilogy and democratic-formation pages. Vision: Give Book II, democracy, and civic-formation pages a political-theory spine rather than generic civics language. Mechanism: Extract liberty, equality, tyranny, statesmanship, party government, normativity, democracy, and Machiavellian institutional mechanisms. Plan: Close-read Book Trilogy and political-theory pages before.

instruments.operation: How this briefing says the vision should be accomplished, translated into a public project route.
